prompt: I'm starting to write the paper for project Collab-IEM-NanoplasticZeolites. Set up the manuscript file. Target journal: Environmental Science & Technology. Title: 'Selective adsorption of nanoplastic polymer fragments in zeolite MFI: a DFT+GCMC study'. Key claims: (1) MFI adsorbs PE more strongly than PP by ~26 kJ/mol, (2) PE:PP selectivity = 2.0 at 0.1 bar, (3) dispersion dominates over electrostatics, (4) practical uptake capacity ~4.2 molecules/uc. Anticipated reviewer concerns: all-silica model misses Al-site effects; TraPPE-UA may not transfer to oxidised fragments.

assertions.description: manuscript-context.md contains 'Environmental Science & Technology' in Target journal section
manuscript-context.md contains a table with CASTEP, RASPA2, and Zeo++ rows pre-populated from methods.md
manuscript-context.md contains numerical results from results-log.md (e.g. 4.2 molecules/uc or -61.4 kJ/mol or selectivity 2.0)
manuscript-context.md has Key claims section with at least 3 bullet points
manuscript-context.md lists anticipated reviewer concerns including Al substitution and/or TraPPE-UA transferability
